note: Test vectors for BaziEngine validation. All times are local time at birth location. Pillars follow 子平命理 standard. Use these to verify engine correctness.

day_pillar_reference.note: Reference for day pillar JDN offset. 2000-01-07 (Gregorian) = 甲子日. JDN(noon) = 2451551. Formula: dayJiaziIndex = (JDN - 2451551) % 60; stemIdx = dayJiaziIndex % 10; branchIdx = dayJiaziIndex % 12

cases.description: Mao Zedong (毛泽东) — publicly available birth data
Known test: 1984-02-04 23:30 (after 立春 of 甲子年) — year boundary test

expected.note: Born after the exact 立春 transition → 甲子年

cases.description: Known test: 1984-02-03 (day before 立春 of 甲子年) — year boundary test

expected.note: Born before 立春 → still 癸亥年 (previous year pillar)

cases.description: Known test: 2000-01-07 — day pillar anchor verification

expected.note: This date is the JDN reference anchor — must be 甲子日

cases.description: Zi hour boundary test — late Zi vs early Zi

expected.note: 23:30 = 晚子时. If distinguish_late_zi=false → 甲子日 + 子时(甲子). If distinguish_late_zi=true → day advances at 23:00 → day becomes 乙丑, hour becomes 丙子.
